wordplay_note: His name is his crime — paid in blood money for mass death
card_description: Bruno Bluthgeld (meaning "Bluthgeld = blood money (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Bloodmoney*. Nuclear physicist whose error caused the war and who lives in paranoid guilt. Name note: His name is his crime — paid in blood money for mass death. The scientist as mass murderer — blood money for the apocalypse. First appears in *Dr. Bloodmoney*.

reference.brief: Nuclear physicist whose error caused the war and who lives in paranoid guilt
reference.significance: The scientist as mass murderer — blood money for the apocalypse
